_comment: Skewed cube corner (v_6 moved off-axis), bevel all 3 incident edges with width=0.15 segments=4 (even, power-of-2 seg). Exercises cubic_subdiv from canonical seg=2 → seg=4 (one CC step) plus the unit-cube affine map for non-perpendicular face normals. Companion to cube_skewed_corner (seg=2) and cube_skewed_corner_s5 (seg=5 odd) — covers the 'integer power of 2 above seg=2' path.
